creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Henrich,
Thanks for the report.

I tried on recent main with 

pkg fetch -o /usr/ports/packages/ graphics/qgis

and it gives me

New packages to be FETCHED:
        qgis: 3.38.1_2 (73 MiB: 100.00% of the 73 MiB to download)


Also there is no hint from package builders about a problem. Normally I receive corresponding mails from the package cluster in case of errors.

Is it possible that the configuration for pkg has been changed on your side? Do you also have such problems with other packages? Or have you simply tried to get the package again in the meantime?
